title: Pigeon Modpack
description: Cobblemon, Enhanced Villagers that actually have personalities and Automation what more could a person want?
body:
# About This Modpack:
This modpack is designed to be played with a small group of friends on a private server.
The primary foci of the pack are Create (+addons),Cobblemon and MCA with the goal of exploring the world and creating your own small towns full of friends, pokemon and ofcourse automation. 

## Primary Mods:
-  Applied Energistics 2 - Crafting and storage solution
-  Create (plus a few addons) - Automation and factory production
-  Cobblemon - who doesn't want a lil friend or, quite a few of them
-  MCA or Minecraft Comes Alive - turn your normal villagers into fully interactive friends and family
-  Point Blank - adds a few weapons to help out
-  Sodium, Indium and a few other performance enhancement mods
-  Chipped - add a bit more texture to your builds
-  and finally several misc QoL Mods
